tasks.completion_summary: Fixed $1-$9 inside double quotes emitting $args[N] without subexpression wrapping. Added inDoubleQuote parameter to EmitSimpleVar, wrapping $args[N], $args.Count, and $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Name in $() when inside double-quoted context. All 578 tests pass.
Fixed extra blank lines in while-read loop by stripping trailing newlines from BashText before splitting. Changed split pipeline in EmitWhileRead to use -replace before -split. All 579 tests pass.

Fixed xargs echo not joining args on single line. Root cause: & $cmd inside Invoke-BashXargs resolved echo to Write-Output (PS built-in alias) instead of Invoke-BashEcho. Fix resolves command name to Invoke-Bash* runtime function before invocation. All 580 tests pass.

Fixed printf no-newline output producing extra blank lines. Root cause: worker always used WriteLine for BashText, adding a newline even when the text intentionally had none. Fix: check if BashText ends with newline; use Write (no newline) when it does not, and track partial lines to flush before EXIT marker. All 581 tests pass.
